CodiceFiscale
Table of Contents

Class CodiceFiscaleMatcher

Namespace
CodiceFiscale
Assembly
CodiceFiscale.dll

Provides methods to match and compare Italian Codice Fiscale strings against personal data.

public class CodiceFiscaleMatcher
Inheritance
object
CodiceFiscaleMatcher
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)

object.GetHashCode()

object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Methods

Matches(string, string, string, DateOnly, Gender, string)

Determines whether the specified Codice Fiscale matches the provided personal data. The comparison is case-insensitive. Omocodia variants of the CF are normalized before comparison.

public static bool Matches(string cf, string name, string surname, DateOnly dateOfBirth, Gender gender, string belfioreCode)

Parameters

cf string

The Codice Fiscale to check.

name string

The person''s first name (minimum 3 characters).

surname string

The person''s surname (minimum 3 characters).

dateOfBirth DateOnly

The person''s date of birth.

gender Gender

The person''s gender.

belfioreCode string

The 4-character Belfiore code of the person''s place of birth.

Returns

bool

true if the Codice Fiscale is valid and matches the generated CF for the provided personal data; otherwise, false.
